title: Operation SOP Enters the Tower
description: Pages 1–5 focus on operation sop enters the tower, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as usopp, Robin, and the Tontatta reach the heart of the plan to make Sugar faint and restore Dressrosa's forgotten victims.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We've got the four champs from each block...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And the prize that will go to the winner here...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Audience
dialogue.text: Go to Hell you shitty audience!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...is a devil fruit of the strongest, "logia" class...

dialogue.speaker: Jesus Burgess
dialogue.text: That's Jesus Burgess of the Black- Beard Pirate Crew...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If he's not Lucy, then who is he?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: We refuse to recognize the insane results of that last match!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: There's no way we could have lost to a little girl like you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Not knowing when to give up is shameful, you guys. Results are results.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Don't treat us like a bunch of bulls!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Although it flutters with a "Hira Hira" sound...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I'm a "flag man" who ate the "Hira Hira no mi." Anything I touch...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: fighting fish of a fitting caliber for the finals have been released.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: They're especially sensitive to the smell of blood.

summary: Operation SOP Enters the Tower focuses on Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as usopp, Robin, and the Tontatta reach the heart of the plan to make Sugar faint and restore Dressrosa's forgotten victims.
